backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining all core types (UserProfile, VideoClip, FeedbackSubmission, etc.) and including authorization, storage, and HTTP outcall mixins with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Defines OldActor and NewActor state types for canister upgrades and exports a no-op `run` migration function that passes old state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their corresponding frontend/backend files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key props/behavior of every component and hook.
frontend/.env: Sets the VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable to the project's Google OAuth client ID for local development.
frontend/.env.example: Template and step-by-step guide for configuring the VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID environment variable, including instructions for creating Google Cloud OAuth credentials and troubleshooting common errors.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard Vite/Node gitignore that excludes node_modules, build output, editor files, and environment variable files from version control.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite React app, setting the page title to 'Beast Clipping' and mounting the app via src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that sets up routing with TanStack Router, React Query, and renders the main app shell with all pages and components including login, dashboard, admin panel, and OAuth callback.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusErr: Displays a full-screen error UI for banned or suspended users, showing relevant messaging and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusGua: Route guard component that checks the authenticated user's profile status and renders a ban/suspension error screen or a loading spinner before allowing access to children.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogTable: Renders a searchable, scrollable table of activity logs fetched via a custom hook, displaying user ID, action, and timestamp with loading skeletons.
Admin-only debug panel that displays authentication and initialization diagnostics including admin principals, hashmap size, and character-level principal comparison, with copy and refresh controls.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary for the admin panel that catches render errors and displays the error message, stack trace, and options to retry or navigate home.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a card listing all current admin users fetched from the backend, showing their short IDs and full principal strings with loading and error states.
Renders a form to add a new admin by Principal ID using the `useAddAdmin` hook, and displays the existing admin list via `AdminList`.
frontend/src/components/AdminMessaging.t: Provides a form for admins to send a direct message to a user by Principal ID, using the `useSendAdminMessage` hook.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard that checks the user's role and renders collapsible sections for analytics, user management, activity logs, messaging, feedback, admin management, and system controls.
frontend/src/components/AppAnalytics.tsx: Displays admin analytics including stat cards (total clips, trending clips, click interactions) and a bar chart of videos uploaded per hour over the last 24 hours.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Layout wrapper that renders a desktop sidebar (`SideNavigation`), main content area, and a mobile bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Mobile fixed bottom navigation bar that filters nav items based on the user's role and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/CaptionEditor.ts: A text editor component for writing social media captions with character limit enforcement, emoji shortcuts, copy-to-clipboard, and formatting tips tooltip.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Displays YouTube channel connection status and provides a button to connect a YouTube channel via OAuth, using the `useYouTubeChannel` hook.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Renders a single video clip card with thumbnail, title, timestamps, viral score badge, and action buttons for downloading, posting to YouTube, and deleting the clip.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Fetches and displays a list of ClipCard components, handling loading, error, and empty states, with optional clip selection callback.
Displays AI-generated or trending clip suggestions with viral scores, allowing users to select a suggestion to populate clip creation fields.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for setting clip start/end timestamps and title, with support for pre-filling from suggestions and saving the clip via the clip creation hook.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: Modal dialog for submitting user feedback as either a feature request or bug report, with validation and form reset on close.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of all feedback submissions with type badges, submitter info, timestamps, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Passthrough layout wrapper component retained for compatibility, as actual layout is handled by AppShell.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog component for first-time profile setup, allowing users to enter a display name and upload a profile picture, then save the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SideNavigation.t: A sticky sidebar navigation component that renders role-filtered nav links, displays the authenticated user's avatar and greeting, and provides a logout button.
frontend/src/components/SystemControls.t: An admin UI card with confirmation dialogs for triggering server restart and shutdown actions via actor mutations, with toast feedback.
A sidebar card that displays the top 5 trending clips with rank badges and trending scores, fetched from admin stats, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the authenticated user's short user ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each.
frontend/src/components/UserMessages.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of messages sent to the current user from admins, showing sender, timestamp, and message body, with loading skeletons and hidden empty state.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: A badge component that renders a styled, icon-labeled badge for a given UserRole enum value (owner, admin, user, friend) with configurable size.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin UI component for managing user statuses and roles, supporting search, bulk selection, status changes via dropdown, and bulk deletion of user clips with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/VerticalClipPrev: Displays a 9:16 vertical preview card for a video clip, showing its YouTube thumbnail, play overlay, viral score badge, duration, and time range info.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component that accepts a YouTube URL, validates it, loads the video, and optionally triggers AI clip generation, displaying relevant errors and loading states.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score with color-coded styling and an icon based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple component that renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed given a video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivityLogs.ts: React Query hook that fetches activity logs from the backend actor, enabled only for authenticated owner/admin users, with a 15-second refetch interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access if a token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a new admin by user ID and invalidates admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Query hook that fetches debug information about the current user's admin status and principal, with placeholder fields for backend methods not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend using the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend via two separate React Query queries, combining their loading and error states.
React Query mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions for a video, falling back to mock AI-generated suggestions if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: React Query mutation hook that calculates a viral score for a clip based on duration and title, then saves the clip to the backend via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all clips for the authenticated user and provides a delete mutation with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Stateful hook managing start/end timestamp inputs (minutes and seconds), with helpers for validation, formatting, and converting to/from total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentEntries.ts: Set of React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting content entries via the backend actor, each with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: React Query mutation hook that deletes a feedback submission by ID and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: React Query mutation hook that fetches a download URL from the backend and triggers a browser file download for a video clip.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: React Query hook that fetches all feedback submissions from the backend actor when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: React Query mutation hook that submits user feedback to the backend and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error instead of throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook implementing Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with verbose debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyMessages.ts: React Query hook that fetches the current user's admin messages from the backend actor, polling every 30 seconds when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: React Query mutation hook that validates Google OAuth credentials and clip duration (≤60s), then posts a clip to YouTube Shorts via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching/saving the caller's user profile and storing Google OAuth credentials, invalidating relevant caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScheduledUploads.t: React Query hooks for listing, adding, and deleting scheduled YouTube uploads, with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSendAdminMessage.t: React Query mutation hook that sends an admin message to a specified user via the backend actor and shows toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates a user's role via the backend actor and invalidates role-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates a user's status via the backend actor and invalidates relevant user/profile queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: React Query hook that fetches all user roles and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: React Query hooks for checking YouTube channel connection status, initiating Google OAuth flow, and disconnecting the channel, with cache invalidation on changes.
Utility hook exposing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract 11-character video IDs from them.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines dark-mode CSS custom properties along with reusable component utility classes like glass cards and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentManager.tsx: Admin-only page component for managing content entries (create, edit, delete) with role-based access control, dialogs, and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/MyClipsPage.tsx: A simple page component that displays the user's saved clips using the ClipList component, with a header and scissors icon.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: Handles the Google OAuth redirect callback by waiting for the backend actor to become available, extracting URL params, and storing the OAuth credentials via a mutation, with timeout and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/Scheduler.tsx: A page for scheduling video clip uploads to YouTube, allowing users to select a clip and date/time, view scheduled uploads, and delete them, using React Query mutations and queries against the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/TrendingPage.tsx: Displays a ranked list of trending clips sorted by viral score, with special styling for the top 3 entries, loading skeletons, and an empty state, sourcing data from the useAdminStats hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 8-character alphanumeric user ID from a principal string using a simple 32-bit hash converted to base36.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: A debugging utility class for tracking the YouTube OAuth flow, providing structured logging, response validation, and common error pattern matching.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-mode theme with custom oklch-based color palette (primary/indigo accents, glassmorphism surfaces), Space Grotesk/Inter fonts, custom shadows, gradients, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing a premium dark-mode full-stack dashboard with features including clip player, AI caption editor, YouTube scheduler, trending feed, manager CRUD, and a role-gated admin panel, along with architectural notes and known issues.
